prompt: The image tools block in src/components/SidebarRight.tsx (the sr-image-tools div — add/change image button, opacity slider, zoom label, and remove image button) should be its own component. Extract it to TileImageTools in src/components/sidebar_right/.
assertions: TileImageTools.tsx exports a function named TileImageTools
TileImageTools.tsx defines AddImageIcon and TrashIcon (SVG functions previously in SidebarRight.tsx)
TileImageTools.tsx accepts props: selectedTile, onEditTile, onOpenTileImage, onBeforeOpacityChange
SidebarRight.tsx renders <TileImageTools instead of the old sr-image-tools div
SidebarRight.tsx no longer defines AddImageIcon or TrashIcon
